required_teams.team_description: Evacuate participants, manage choke points, prevent trampling

inject_templates.template: Stabbing reported at {venue}. Attacker may still be on site. Choke points at escalators and platforms.
Conflicting witness reports. Attacker description varies. Multiple exits; attacker could move between them.
Attacker seen moving between platforms. Evacuation routes at risk. Transit security coordinating.
Injured person at platform edge. Trampling risk. Triage and evacuation coordination needed.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when transit security or coordination decides to halt train service
decision_branches.inject_template: Stop all trains? Prevents attacker escape but may strand passengers. Continue service? Risk of attacker moving.

decision_branches.trigger_condition: when evacuation team decides platform evacuation order
decision_branches.inject_template: Multiple platforms. Which to evacuate first? Attacker location unknown.
